title: diagnose-loop on a failing system
invocation_hint: Invoke SKI-PRO-1005 (diagnose-loop) and walk through the reproduce → minimise → hypothesise → instrument loop for the symptom below.
task_description: A Rust web server has 8% of requests returning 502 after a recent deploy. Apply diagnose-loop to produce the first 3 cycles of the disciplined diagnosis loop.
